title: rootless, overlay: use fuse-overlayfs
body:
when running in rootless mode, use fuse-overlayfs for mounting the
overlay file system on the host.  Then create a bind mount inside the
container.

Closes: https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1741

Signed-off-by: Giuseppe Scrivano <gscrivan@redhat.com>

comments.body: marked as WIP, as it should honor the `mount_program` option in the storage configuration file

> marked as WIP, as it should honor the `mount_program` option in the storage configuration file

fixed now
Do we have tests for this that will run in rootless mode?
